analysis.compliance_summary: The procurement system has blocked several emergency reorders due to supplier risk scores exceeding thresholds and CDSCO approval requirements.

blocked_resolutions.violation_explanation: Supplier risk score (0.85) exceeds the allowed threshold (0.6) for emergency procurement of Heparin.
resolution_steps: Negotiate with supplier to meet the required risk score
Verify compliance before executing the emergency reorder
